summary: Show planning workflow orientation and package-owned planning lifecycle commands for agents before they create or mutate planning surfaces.

steps.description: Resolve the target root for contextual command examples.
Build planning orientation, lifecycle command, and fallback guidance.
Emit help in the requested format.

guards: Do not create, activate, queue, or archive planning records from the help command.
Point agents to package-owned lifecycle commands before direct file edits.
proof: planning help command tests remain compatible
contract tooling command-surface parity remains clean
